title: F2P Starter Core
description: An easily accessible core built on three 4★ anchors. Apollinis holds the frontline and pairs with Starspine — good magic damage with AOE and a stun — to trigger the Light 2 synergy. Framamba adds solid physical DPS and is Shilian's companion, so the 4★ Eidos buffs Framamba directly while nudging the team toward a Memory roster. The one 5★, Camcorgi, is free for everyone via Apex Club quests (fully F2P-accessible) and brings good physical damage, AOE and crowd control; together with Framamba it leaves the flexible last slot just one Memory unit away from the Memory 3 synergy. These four clear most content — vary the remaining Nexus Anima and Eidos slots around them. (see more teams below)
